ows:ServiceProvider.ows:ProviderName: Bureau de Recherches Géologiques et Minières

FeatureType.Name: sams:SF_SpatialSamplingFeature
FeatureType.Title: Hydrometric stations and sites
FeatureType.Abstract:
A hydrometric site is a geographical location (section of a watercourse) where flow measurements are taken and considered homogeneous and comparable. To simplify its use on maps, the hydrometric site is represented as a single point.
A hydrometric station is a device installed at a hydrometric site to measure a specific quantity related to hydrometry (water level or flow rate). It is generally a water level gauge that allows for the observation of water level. A station can display a water level and/or a flow rate, either directly measured or calculated from a rating curve.
